## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? What is currently frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution clearly and concisely.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you have thought of and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
